title: Music Theory Key Concepts Wheel, Guitar, Piano, Accelerated Learning Tool, Understand Chords, Scales, Keys - FAST! No Music Reading Needed. New for 2025.
features: ✅ Learn the structures of music theory in the palm of your hand, no confusing textbooks, see it right in front of your eyes. Beginner, Intermediate and Advanced concepts are simplified like never before, take your understanding and creativity further and learn faster than you thought possible.

✅ Learn and use key music theory concepts. Major and minor keys, relative and parallel keys, borrowed chords, modes and more. Concepts which don't seem to 'click' easily. Well now they do, in minutes, not months! Surprise yourself with what you can create and finally play what you feel, take your songs wherever you want without ever getting 'stuck' again.
✅ Works for guitar, piano, ukulele & more! New for 2025.
✅ FREE Step-by-Step Tutorial – 15-page downloadable guide & quick instructions on the back.
✅ Unique 3-layered design. Chords and Notes update automatically - nothing is hidden away.
description: Product Description Your Ultimate Music Companion Discover the power of the Music Theory Wheel —your go-to tool for music mastery. Learn which chords belong in any key, move between major and minor with ease, and transpose progressions instantly. Learn to find parallel and relative keys for more creative possibilities. Say goodbye to anxiety during jam sessions, knowing what to play. Unlock your creativity with modes, borrowed chords, and explore endless musical ideas. Built for all skill levels, it will help you master music with confidence. Compact & Portable: Designed to fit in your bag, it’s durable and ready to go wherever you create, whether in practice, performances, or studio work. FREE Step-by-Step Tutorial: Get a 15-page downloadable tutorial to guide you through the basics, plus summarised instructions printed on the wheel for quick reference anytime. Affordable Music Mastery: Gain lifetime access to knowledge that’s usually only available to seasoned musicians—all for a one-time price. No need for expensive courses. Durable & Long-Lasting: Made from premium-quality plastic, it’s built to withstand regular use and last for years—perfect for practice, gigs, and songwriting sessions. Transform the Way You Create Music: The Music Theory Wheel is the key to unlocking your musical potential. Revolutionise how you create music—start mastering it today! Music Theory Shouldn't Be Confusing Take your understanding and creativity to the next level Take your understanding and creativity to the next level Ever wonder how some musicians seem to know exactly which chords to play in any key? The answer is simple: STRUCTURE . The Music Theory Wheel gives you the notes and chords to play in almost any key, while teaching you the underlying structure of music . Once you grasp the structure, it becomes your go-to tool for defeating writer's block and creating like never before. Unlock Endless Creativity: Understand how chords, scales, and keys work together, and break free from traditional theory limitations to create music that’s truly your own. Perfect for ALL Skill Levels: Whether you're a complete beginner or an experienced pro, this tool makes music theory simple and accessible to everyone. Instant Key Mastery: Learn major and minor keys instantly and explore relative and parallel keys for endless musical exploration. Master Chords & Progressions: Know exactly which chords to play in any key, and confidently transpose progressions to create fresh, exciting music. Say Goodbye to Writer’s Block: With the Music Theory Wheel, you’ll always have the right chords and scales at your fingertips—no more staring at a blank page. Jamming Made Easy: Eliminate stress during jam sessions—never wonder which chords to play again. Always be in the zone, knowing exactly what fits. Perfect for Every Ability Level 1. Rotate the key so that it contains a note and a scale , like G and Major . 2. That's it! Scale notes are all highlighted, and the chords in that key are shown. Now you can play a chord progression, create your own, change to another key instantly, find the relative minor key, parallel key, parallel or relative mode, and see the structure of music as you do it! Change to ANY note and ANY key and the wheel will automatically update thanks to the unique triple layered design. Unlike Circle of Fifth Wheels, the structure of music is NOT hidden from view, you will see how easy music theory can be when you can visualise it. Step-By-Step Tutorial Included 15 Page Downloadable Instructions are included, suitable for any ability level. Summarised instructions are printed on the reverse of the Music Theory Wheel too for easy access. Leave the textbooks on the shelf, discover core music theory concepts quickly. Portable, durable and easy to use, the Music Theory Wheel is your essential music bag tool for practise, jamming and songwriting. Take your knowledge and creativity to the next level, FAST!
